allow: PowerShell(cd d:\\autoblogspot; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "run.py" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell(cd d:\\autoblogspot; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "run.py" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Start-Process "http://127.0.0.1:8000"; "Server OK - Browser opened" } else { "Server failed to start" })
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "Server ONLINE - HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "Server offline" })

PowerShell(cd d:\\autoblogspot; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "run.py" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\autoblogspot" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Start-Process "http://127.0.0.1:8000"; "✓ Server chạy OK - Đã mở browser" } else { "Lỗi khởi động" })

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "run.py" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\autoblogspot" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/settings" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "✓ Server restarted OK" } else { "Lỗi" })

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "run.py" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\autoblogspot" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/settings" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "run.py" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\autoblogspot" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path d:\\autoblogspot -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Extension | Where-Object { $_.Extension -ne "" } | Sort-Object Extension | Select-Object -First 50)

PowerShell(cd d:\\autoblogspot; $proc = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn app.main:app --port 8001" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8001/ -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response }; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Location: $\($r.Headers['Location']\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force 2>$null)
